set-variable.value: #[{ hosts: p('aerospike.hosts'), namespace: p('aerospike.namespace'), tlsEnabled: p('aerospike.tlsEnabled') as Boolean, authEnabled: p('aerospike.authEnabled') as Boolean, tlsName: p('aerospike.tlsName') default null, username: p('aerospike.username') default null, password: p('aerospike.password') default null, readTimeout: p('aerospike.readTimeout') as Number, writeTimeout: p('aerospike.writeTimeout') as Number, connectTimeout: p('aerospike.connectTimeout') as Number }]
set-variable.doc:name: Build Aerospike config
